'''zhanoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumotype|pneumotype]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumotype|pneumotype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhanoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhænereth|zhænereth]] || [[word:zhænerej|zhænerej]] || [[word:zhæneresh|zhæneresh]] || [[word:zhænere|zhænere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhanonoroth|zhanonoroth]] || [[word:zhanonoroj|zhanonoroj]] || [[word:zhanonorosh|zhanonorosh]] || [[word:zhanonoro|zhanonoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanoroth|zhanoroth]] || [[word:zhanoroj|zhanoroj]] || [[word:zhanorosh|zhanorosh]] || [[word:zhanoro|zhanoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhanofroth|zhanofroth]] || [[word:zhanofroj|zhanofroj]] || [[word:zhanofrosh|zhanofrosh]] || [[word:zhanofrof|zhanofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanorotho|zhanorotho]] || [[word:zhanorojo|zhanorojo]] || [[word:zhanorosho|zhanorosho]] || [[word:zhanoroko|zhanoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanoroth|zhanoroth]] || [[word:zhanoroj|zhanoroj]] || [[word:zhanorosh|zhanorosh]] || [[word:zhanoro|zhanoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanorothol|zhanorothol]] || [[word:zhanorojol|zhanorojol]] || [[word:zhanoroshol|zhanoroshol]] || [[word:zhanorokol|zhanorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanorothotho|zhanorothotho]] || [[word:zhanorojojo|zhanorojojo]] || [[word:zhanoroshosho|zhanoroshosho]] || [[word:zhanoroko|zhanoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanorothon|zhanorothon]] || [[word:zhanorojon|zhanorojon]] || [[word:zhanoroshon|zhanoroshon]] || [[word:zhanorokon|zhanorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanorothoro|zhanorothoro]] || [[word:zhanorojoro|zhanorojoro]] || [[word:zhanoroshoro|zhanoroshoro]] || [[word:zhanorokoro|zhanorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
